title: McConnell says Trump, Tucker Carlson to blame for delayed Ukraine aid
shortDescription: Mitch McConnell blamed Donald Trump and Tucker Carlson for the delayed passage of Ukraine aid included in Tuesday's $95 billion foreign aid package.

title: OnPolitics: George Santos is dropping his reelection bid
shortDescription: Disgraced former Rep. George Santos R-N.Y., is dropping his comeback bid less than two months after announcing he was running for reelection.

title: Speaker Mike Johnson to visit Columbia University amid protests
shortDescription: Republican Speaker Mike Johnson is calling for Columbia University's president to resign ahead of his campus visit amid pro-Palestinian protests.

title: Pennsylvania Senate race feels tug of Biden and Trump unpopularity
shortDescription: Political analysts believe the key to winning Pennsylvania’s high-stakes Senate contest may be in the candidates’ ability to outrun Biden and Trump.

title: Image of Diddy, Trump and Epstein is digitally fabricated | Fact check
shortDescription: Combs was digitally added to an image that experts agree was already AI-generated.

title: Biden signs foreign aid bill that also forces TikTok sale or ban
shortDescription: Immediately after Biden's signature, the Pentagon announced a $1 billion military aid package is headed to Ukraine.

title: Congress passes TikTok sell-or-ban bill
shortDescription: The future of TikTok remains unknown as a $95 billion foreign aid package restricting the app was passed by Congress.

title: Nebraska's caregiver tax credit passes as demand for caregivers grows
shortDescription: The Cornhusker State gives 179,000 caregivers a financial break for taking care of the most vulnerable

title: Congress passes foreign aid bill, TikTok sell-or-ban | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus, Israel slams northern Gaza, while Hamas calls for an escalation. Campus protests continue. This and more top stories on USA TODAY's The Excerpt.

title: Biden pardons, commutes sentences of 16 jailed on non-violent drug charges
shortDescription: Many of those granted pardons or commuted sentences had been given longer prison sentences than they would have under current law.

title: Abortion battle: Supreme Court hears Biden's challenge to Idaho's ban
shortDescription: The abortion fight returns to the Supreme Court, with arguments over an Idaho ban. Demonstrators lay down under bloody sheets; others vowed to 'Fight Fascism.'

shortDescription: Analysts say the key to winning Pennsylvania’s high-stakes Senate contest may be in the candidates’ ability to outrun unpopular presidential candidates.

title: Are the jurors in Trump's hush money trial sequestered? What to know
shortDescription: Donald Trump's hush money trial in Manhattan is underway. The jurors aren't sequestered, so can they stay anonymous? Here is what we know about them.

title: Trump's supporters aren't going to his trial. He's still campaigning on the case
shortDescription: Donald Trump's supporters aren't exactly flocking to New York City to protest his hush money trial.

title: $95B foreign aid bill passed, TikTok ban plan
shortDescription: The massive funding bill that showcased shifting attitudes about America's role in global affairs also includes a part about a possible TikTok ban.

title: Congress passes TikTok sell-or-ban bill, but legal battles loom
shortDescription: Lawmakers argue that the popular social media app poses a national security threat. TikTok has pledged to fight the policy in court.

title: Senate passes $95 billion foreign aid bill, heads to Biden
shortDescription: The massive funding bill divided Republicans and showcased shifting attitudes about America's role in global affairs.

title: Tennessee passes bill allowing teachers, school staff to carry concealed guns
shortDescription: The legislation sailed through the lower chamber and will go to Tennessee Gov. Bill Lee's desk. After the vote, the House descended into chaos.

title: Tabloid exec: Stories were killed for Trump

title: Disgraced former Rep. George Santos ends reelection campaign
shortDescription: The disgraced former lawmaker isn't running for reelection, but teased he will "be back."

title: Georgia governor signs bill limiting kids' access to the internet
shortDescription: The Peach State has a new law that requires parental consent before allowing minors to create social media accounts.
